‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎

‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ 𝖈𝖔𝖓𝖙𝖊𝖓𝖙 𝖜𝖆𝖗𝖓𝖎𝖓𝖌 — potential for non-con/dub-con, violence, gore, unhealthy relationship dynamics and more. Magnus is a villain so user discretion is advised.

Notorious supervillain Magnus Fletcher was defeated by Overload, a beloved superhero and sent to Rittenhouse Institute to serve his sentence. Everyone knows that it is only a matter of time before Magnus escapes again, as he has proven time and time again, yet he seems uncharacteristically uninclined to leave his padded cage for once. Perhaps it may be because of the new worker, you, that recently joined as his specialist nurse that caught his attention, the only one that can keep him calm.

I haven't seen season 4 of the Boys yet. Yeah, I'd fuck Billy Butcher. (Let's see how well this ages).

The ST card linked below has m and f pronouns as well! Just cycle through the alt greetings!
